plan_audit.note: Auditor confirmed arithmetic (store 68 / memory_size 42 / total 110; 5+45+0+60==110) against source, oracle discipline, non-regression protection, 0x40-vs-blocktype disjointness, instantiate() seam reality, and owner gating. ONE blocking fix folded: the M3 enumerator must NOT copy M2's categorical .load/.store/memory. ban (would false-reject i32.store/memory.size/memory.grow) — replaced with an ASYMMETRIC allow-set + residual bans (any .load; any .store not i32.store; any memory.* not size/grow; Data section) + a live monkeypatch regression proving the ban fires. THREE recommended folds added: (1) per-instance fresh-memory FIRST-RUN path unit-tested; (2) OOB trap-string provenance clarified (constant from upstream memory_trap.wast:23 / memory_grow.wast:86, excluded files never converted in M3); (3) memory_size's 4 limit forms named as the grow oracle check. Auditor pre-cleared execution once folded.

execution_audit.note: 9/9 criteria independently verified from raw evidence in fresh processes. Adversarially drove scope_violations: in-scope {i32.store} returns [] (asymmetry proven), all 16 out-of-scope injections fire, _assert_gate_live runs first in main(). Decoder rejects all deferred bytes 0x28-0x35/0x37-0x3E, sections 11/2/4/6/9/8/12/0, limits flags 0x03/0x04/0x05, multi-memory, nonzero memidx. 0x40 opcode vs empty-block-type disjoint (M2 byte-identical). Memory LE + bounds trap 'out of bounds memory access' + grow prev/-1/max/cap + align-ignored + per-instance-fresh all confirmed. Protected files byte-untouched; no authored expected; clean diff. Owner boundary (commit/push/PR) NOT authorized by the audit.

step0_scope_gate.note: IN SCOPE; inline self-check PASS; scope.txt byte-deterministic (git diff --exit-code = 0).

m0_m1_m2_not_regressed.protected_files_diff_vs_origin_main: EMPTY (manifest_m0/m2, run_m1/m2, enumerate_m1/m2, m0/m1/m2.yml, m1/m2 scope files)

scope.new_opcodes_note: i32.store (0x36) from store.wast; memory.size (0x3F) + memory.grow (0x40) from memory_size.wast. Loads (0x28-0x35), i64.store, and narrow stores (0x37-0x3E) stay Unsupported (no integer-pure target uses them at pin 82cd4f9).
scope.data_section: DEFERRED (Unsupported) - no target declares a data segment
scope.oob_trap: implemented for i32.store correctness + unit-tested; trap text 'out of bounds memory access' read from oracle JSON (memory_grow/memory_trap); NOT exercised by an in-scope target

expected_result.note: store.wast: 1 module + 9 assert_return + 51 assert_invalid + 7 assert_malformed. memory_size.wast: 4 module + 36 assert_return + 2 assert_invalid. Neither has assert_trap. VERIFIED by run_m3.py, not asserted.
